/usr/bin/arm-linux-gnueabihf-ar qc libbmsx_core.a CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/platform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/subscription.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/vendor/stb_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/core/primitives.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/core/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/core/registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/core/assets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/core/binencoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/core/rompack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/core/font.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/core/taskgate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/utils/mem_snapshot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/audio/soundmaster.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/input/inputstatemanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/input/playerinput.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/input/actionparser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/input/input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/input/keyboardinput.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/input/gamepadinput.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/render/backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/render/gameview.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/render/queues.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/render/sprites_pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/render/texturemanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/render/renderpasslib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/render/rendergraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/render/glyphs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/emulator/cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/emulator/font.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/emulator/api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/emulator/runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/emulator/program_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/render/gles2_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/render/sprites_pipeline_gles2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmsx_core.dir/render/crt_pipeline_gles2.cpp.o
/usr/bin/arm-linux-gnueabihf-ranlib libbmsx_core.a
